mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM user_activity WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_activity SET today_interaction_count = 0, today_interaction_date = CURDATE() WHERE today_interaction_date != CURDATE() OR today_interaction_date IS NULL
UPDATE user_activity SET login_days = #{loginDays}, last_login_date = CURDATE(), activity_score = #{loginDays} * 5 + LEAST(interaction_count * 3, 200) + 5 WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE user_activity SET interaction_count = #{interactionCount}, today_interaction_count = today_interaction_count + 1, today_interaction_date = CURDATE(), activity_score = login_days * 5 + LEAST(#{interactionCount} * 3, 200) + 5 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_activity (user_id, login_days, interaction_count, activity_score, last_login_date, today_interaction_count, today_interaction_date) VALUES
(#{activity.userId}, #{activity.loginDays}, #{activity.interactionCount}, #{activity.activityScore}, #{activity.lastLoginDate}, #{activity.todayInteractionCount}, #{activity.todayInteractionDate})
